race.comment: LADY MONEY TALK (6) went straight to the front last start and was far too good, winning by 1.4L in a dominant display. Can take up the running again third-up for Fiore and she looks a nice filly on the way up. Can bring up back-to-back wins. JIMMY ANGEL (1) missed in a photo finish tow back before dropping to 1200m last start and ending up 0.9L off the winner. Has the speed to roll across from the tricky barrier and he'll be tough to run down back out in distance. VANDOULA JET (2) steps up to 1400m for the first time today and it looks to suit on what she's done recently. Back in grade today is a bonus and all her gear comes off now. Wouldn't surprise to see her get back to winning ways. CLASSIC RULER (10) is third-up now and looks to be on the way up, finishing 0.5L off the winner last time out. Won't be far away. WHERE'S BRITTANY (9) can improve third-up into the campaign.
